basic_details.job_title: CARI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 14 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central Ayurveda Research Institute (CARI) Senior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Central Ayurveda Research Institute. A total of 14 vacancies have been announced through the CARI Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 35 years of age who have completed B.A.M.S. are eligible to apply for these Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) vacancies. The walk-in interview for CARI Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 15 May 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and attend the walk-in

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Relaxation in age limit in case of SC/ST/OBC candidates will be as per Central Government rules.

qualification.details: Essential: B.A.M.S. from any recognized university. Desirable: Preference will be given to candidates possessing higher qualification or previous research experience in projects funded by Ministry of AYUSH, ICMR, CSIR, DST or equivalent organizations. Working knowledge in computer application. Skills of drafting and editing of scientific documents/official/technical reports etc.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CARI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) posts at CARI is scheduled for 15 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) post?
faq.answer: The essential educational qualification for the Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) position is a B.A.M.S. degree from any recognized university. Desirable qualifications include higher education or prior research experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided to SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Central Government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) position will receive a salary of Rs. 42,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) as applicable.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies for the Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) position announced by the Central Ayurveda Research Institute.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates do not need to apply online; they can directly attend the interview with the required documents.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Central Ayurveda Research Institute, Guwahati, Assam. Specific venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), identity proof, and a set of self-attested photocopies of these documents.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Research Fellow (Ay.) post will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CARI Recruitment 2026?
